retrieval_policy.refresh_when: review_after is on or before query_date
retrieval_policy.realtime_answer_policy: For ticket availability, same-day opening, queue length, weather-sensitive services, performances, temporary exhibitions, and project operations, retrieve a current official source or state that the static dataset cannot confirm the answer.

citation_policy: Resolve source_ids against all metadata source files and show official source URLs for all time-sensitive claims.
source_quality_policy: official_rule_sources.jsonl contains automatically discovered official rule-page candidates. source_audit.jsonl marks the 16 POIs whose direct rule-page URL still requires manual capture before production launch.
